items.name: Y2K Aggyle Vest School Dress
items.description:
More by ZZIDOLYEE https://www.roblox.com/catalog?taxonomy=tZsUsd2BqGViQrJ9Vs3Wah&CreatorName=ZZIDOLYEE&salesTypeFilter=1

Dress up your Roblox avatar in retro-fabulous style with the 'Y2K Aggyle Vest School Dress'! This outfit takes inspiration from the turn of the millennium fashion, featuring a charmingly nostalgic aggyle vest paired with a classic school dress design. With its vibrant colors and playful patterns, this ensemble is perfect for those looking to add a touch of Y2K flair to their virtual wardrobe. Whether you're attending a virtual classroom or exploring the metaverse with friends, this outfit is sure to make a statement and turn heads wherever you go! Get ready to embrace the nostalgia and bring some Y2K vibes to your Roblox adventures!

items.name: Laser Finger Pointers
items.description: The second you equip these, lasers will begin to shoot from your fingers. The color of the laser is up to you. Each click will cycle between a red (does damage), green (heals players), or blue laser (pushes and trips other players). Just be careful--once this is equipped, the lasers will fire! Looks great in places with dynamic lighting!
